positive: Minimalist line art illustration of three stacked abstract mountains and a single crescent moon. The design uses only thin, continuous black lines on a solid white background. Clean, negative space composition, suitable for modern home decor, single color ink drawing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, gradients, shading, photorealistic, messy lines, color fills
